name: seelenruh
description: Seelenruh (peace of the soul) — RAG civic-support assistant. Python + LangGraph + FAISS backend, React + Vite frontend.

scripts.install:all: npm install && npm --prefix client install && py -3.10 -m venv server/.venv && server/.venv/Scripts/python -m pip install -r server/requirements.txt
scripts.dev: concurrently -n server,client -c green,cyan "npm run dev:server" "npm run dev:client"
scripts.dev:server: cross-env PYTHONUNBUFFERED=1 server/.venv/Scripts/python -m uvicorn main:app --reload --port 5000 --app-dir server
scripts.start: cross-env PYTHONUNBUFFERED=1 server/.venv/Scripts/python -m uvicorn main:app --port 5000 --app-dir server
